Title: Osney Bridge towpath diversion Oxford
Description: Towpath closed about 150 yards from bridge. Diversion via Abbey Road returns to Osney Bridge via Botley Road.

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure Henley
Description: Environment Agency closed footbridge on safety grounds. 3-mile diversion via A4155 pavements between Henley and Shiplake. Diversion may extend until 2026-31-01.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge closed north (upstream) of Sandford Lock. Diversion via NCN 5.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway closure
Description: Walkway closed due to corrosion. Path re-routed via Abingdon town centre. May reopen if river levels drop but will close again when levels rise.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure near Marlow
Description: Environment Agency deemed bridge unsafe. Closed for foreseeable future. Follow diversion to Bisham Abbey then minor roads to Marlow.

Title: Bridge 142 (Runnymede) closure Egham
Description: Cast iron bridge hit by tree in 2023, closed Feb 2024 with cracks detected. Diversion via River Park Ave & pavements on A308/Causeway. Expected until 2027.

Title: Bell Weir Lock diversion Runnymede
Description: Thames Path temporarily diverted at Runnymede Pleasure Ground during weir refurbishment. Work 2026 spring to autumn 2027. Lock remains operational.

Title: Penton Hook Island Thames Path unaffected
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees. Thames Path unaffected by closure.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure Faringdon
Description: Ten Foot bridge crosses Thames between Rushey and Shifford locks near Buckland/Faringdon. Closed March 2024 due to structural safety concerns. Specialist survey completed.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank of Grand Union Canal (between River Brent bridge and Brentford Marina). Partial reopening: walk Ham, cross canal, follow to Thames Lock, cross back, follow Dock Road.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Half mile diversion from towpath due to eroding towpath. Follows inland Manor Road footpath. Riverside route unlikely to reopen until late 2026.

Title: Benson Weir walkway reopened
Description: Footbridge over Benson Weir reopened 2026-04-01 after 3+ year closure for safety. Completely replaced with upgraded weir including fish pass.
